LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT JOSE POLASEK'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 1, 2015 TO GIVE THE OPPOSING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. PLAINTIFF MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN NOVEMBER 19, 2015 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. NOT REPORTED. (302/EHG)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-01-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT JOSE POLASEK's Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment is Off calendar. On November 17, 2015, parties filed a Notice of Withdrawal of Motion to Set Aside Default Judgment. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/ehg

Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-19-2015 Continued To Dec-01-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JOSE POLASEK'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment is continued to December 1, 2015 to give the opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Plaintiff must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than November 19, 2015 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not Reported. (302/EHG)
